name: Fabulous Chick-Pea Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces cooked chickpeas (1-3/4 cups), rinsed and drained
2 tablespoons lemon juice, or less to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil and a generous spray of cooking spray in a large pot for 4 to 5 seconds.
2. Stir in the onions and garlic, and sauté over medium-low heat, stirring frequently. Add up to 2 teaspoons of water if needed to prevent burning.
3. Stir in the carrots, sweet potato, chickpeas, and chicken broth.
4. Cover and simmer for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the carrots are tender.
5. Remove from heat and puree the soup. Return to the pot, then stir in the lemon juice, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Reheat just to a boil, and serve immediately with a green salad and some crusty breads. Freezes well.
Prep time: 10 mins. Cook time: 40 minutes (mostly unattended). Yield: 6 cups. Per cup: 148 cals; 3.5 g fat (2.2%). Exchange values: 1 vegetable; 1-1/2 bread; 1/2 fat. Fear of Frying: A Sensible Approach to Quick & Easy, Healthy, Low-Fat Eating for the Busy Family. (1996) by Virginia N. White (Chronimed Publishing).
